items.headline: Tesla’s (NASDAQ:TSLA) Q2 CY2026: Beats On Revenue
items.summary: Electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) reported Q2 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 25.5% year on year to $28.24 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.33 per share was 39.1% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

items.headline: Why Tesla Stock Isn't Down More
